title: SRS Theme Definition (ext:themes-l1)
description: Visual presentation layer for a DocumentView. Specifies assets, element templates, and stylesheets without altering semantic structure. Depends on ext:views-l2.

description.description: What this theme is for; intended output format and audience.

targets.description: Output formats this theme is designed for (e.g. 'html', 'markdown'). Implementations apply this theme only when DocumentView.format appears in this list. MUST contain at least one entry (Rule [T-1b]).

assets.description: Named asset declarations. Names must be unique within the Theme. Referenced in templates as {{asset:name}}.

cssClassFields.description: fieldIds whose values are injected as CSS classes on record wrapper elements. Only string, text, and select valueTypes generate classes. Only applies to 'html' and 'pdf' output.

AssetDeclaration.description: A named asset referenced in templates via {{asset:name}}.

path.description: Local file path. Required when mode === 'local'.

data.description: Base64 for binary types; raw text for stylesheet/data. Required when mode === 'inline'.

PageTemplates.description: Page-level chrome for paginated output formats ('pdf', 'docx'). Ignored for non-paginated formats.

coverPage.description: Rendered as the first page. Available variables: all DocumentView preamble variables, {{asset:*}}, {{heading-1}}.

pageHeader.description: Repeated at the top of each page. Additional variable: {{page-number}}.

pageFooter.description: Repeated at the bottom of each page. Additional variable: {{page-number}}.

ElementTemplates.description: Templates that wrap auto-rendered content at each structural level. Each receives {{content}} and returns the full output. Templates wrap — they do not replace or reorder content.

documentWrapper.description: Wraps the entire rendered document body. Available: {{content}}, {{container-title}}, {{date}}, {{asset:*}}.

sectionWrapperOverrides.description: Per-section overrides. Takes precedence over sectionWrapper when sectionId matches. sectionId values MUST be unique within this array.

recordWrapperOverrides.description: Per-type overrides. Takes precedence over recordWrapper when typeId matches. typeId values MUST be unique within this array.

fieldRow.description: Wraps each field label+value pair. Available: {{field-label}}, {{field-value}}, {{field-name}}, {{content}}. Applied after ExportConfig filtering/ordering when renderViewId is set. Does not wrap ExportConfig.preamble content.

groupFieldRowTemplates.description: ext:field-groups RFC-007 [T-Gx1] — per-field-name templates for individual field rows in group entries. Key: Field.name. Value: template string with {{field-value}} and {{field-label}}. Applied only when the group has no known compositeRenderer or falls back to baseline.

compositeRendererConfig.description: ext:field-groups RFC-007 — per-renderer config, keyed by the same identifier space as FieldGroup.compositeRenderer. 'table' renderer reads: tableClass (string), wrapperTemplate (string with {{subheading}}/{{label}}/{{table}}), captionTemplate (string with {{field-value}}).

typeId.description: Matches Record.typeId; targets all records of this type.

TypographyHints.description: Informative declarations. No normative rendering behaviour is derived from these values.
